goals.title: PR1 온보딩 입력 바 구현 시작: plans/spec-onboarding-input-bar.md 기준으로 VibeLign...
goals.objective: PR1 온보딩 입력 바 구현 시작: plans/spec-onboarding-input-bar.md 기준으로 VibeLign GUI 첫 온보딩 화면을 ChatGPT식 단일 입력 바 중심으로 바꾸고, 기존 기능 카드/터미널/도움말/GitHub/첫걸음 아코디언을 기본 첫 화면에서 제거한다. TDD로 Onboarding 입력 바 테스트를 먼저 작성하고 RED→GREEN 증거를 남긴다. Browser 또는 computer-use 실제 화면 QA 증거를 캡처한다.

successCriteria.scenario: happy path for: PR1 온보딩 입력 바 구현 시작: plans/spec-onboarding-input-bar.md 기준으로 VibeLign GUI 첫 온보...
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with observable happy-path proof for goal 1.

successCriteria.scenario: edge case (boundary/empty/malformed)
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with boundary or malformed-input proof for: PR1 온보딩 입력 바 구현 시작: plans/spec-onboarding-input-bar.md 기준으로 VibeLign GUI 첫 온보....

successCriteria.scenario: Browser use: start Vite dev server on localhost, open /, with no projectDir so Onboarding renders; assert visible text '내 프로젝트를 안전하게 만들기', placeholder '무엇을 만들고 싶나요?', 'Claude Code도 자동으로 준비하기', and no default feature-card/terminal/GitHub/guide text. Capture Playwright action log and screenshot.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/pr1-c001-onboarding-default.json + .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/pr1-c001-onboarding-default.png

successCriteria.scenario: Browser use: start Vite dev server, open /, type Korean text '예약 앱 만들고 싶어' into onboarding prompt, click send without selecting a folder; assert text remains in input, a short folder-required 안내 appears, app stays on onboarding, and no vib start/progress text appears. Capture Playwright action log and screenshot.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/pr1-c002-text-no-folder.json + .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/pr1-c002-text-no-folder.png

successCriteria.scenario: Browser use: start Vite dev server, open /, click '고급 설정 보기'; assert secondary/recent-project/system-detail area becomes available, but legacy terms patch/CodeSpeak/plan-structure are not recommended in the default onboarding surface before expansion. Capture Playwright action log and screenshot.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/pr1-c003-advanced-panel.json + .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/pr1-c003-advanced-panel.png

after.codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e859f-8155-7c50-b3cc-82aa7c4242bd/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e859f-8155-7c50-b3cc-82aa7c4242bd/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
